profile.name: Jessica Chen
personality: with a positive outlook and a love of challenges.
profile.appearance: Long black hair, big eyes, mid height, skinny, healthy look, shape face, white skin,fashion, dress luxry brands, Don't always smile, look yonger, fit, wear high heel shoes, short skirts, sexy, attractive

background.backstory: grow up from a middle class family, travel abroad after high schoo, first went to Australia later family had some financial issue, had to quit from the second year of college She started to work at 20 years old at a travel agency. After one year, she did not be satisfied with her current conditions. One day, she met a rich guy at a night club. That rich business men after knew her background willing to help her. He supported her finished her university and helped her start up some online business. Jessica became successful after a few years. She married to the businessman when she was 30 years old. Then, they moved to Hong Kong.
